stemHtml: You are intercepted by an aircraft that signals “FOLLOW ME”. Due to bad weather conditions and poor visibilty you are unable to do so. What is the appropriate signal to be used to inform the intercepting aircraft that you are unable to comply?

options.b: Switch the landing lights on and off irregularly.
options.c: Switch all available lights on and off regularly.
options.d: Switch the cabin lights on and off.
